text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Bring on the happy! Happy birthday, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! You really remembered my birthday?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh! I never forget the birthdays of
people I've read horoscopes for!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I've come here today to do a special
birthday reading, just for you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, you'd do that for someone like me?
Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll start off with palm reading, then
fortune reading, and then face reading!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're going to do three whole different
readings?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But wait, there's more! Flower reading, astrology,
tasseography—we might as well do them all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wow! You'd really do all that for me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that's why I'm here! Doto, let's fill this
year full with fortune!
